title: Marcus Hearn
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Marcus Hearn''' is the author of ''[[The Cinema of George Lucas]]''. He also edited some of the early issues of [[Star Wars Magazine UK]] and worked on ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]''.

==Sources==
*''[[Star Wars Magazine UK 6]]''
*''[[Star Wars Magazine UK 7]]''
*''[[Star Wars Magazine UK 8]]''
*''[[Star Wars Magazine UK 9]]''
*''[[Star Wars Magazine UK 10]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Illustrated Companion]]''
*''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]''
*''[[The Cinema of George Lucas]]''
